name: Asparagus Rotelle
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Fresh mushrooms, trimmed, halved if large, and sliced
12 oz Fresh asparagus, trimmed and cut into 1/2-inch diagonals
Salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, combine the mushrooms, white wine, and garlic. Cook over low heat until the mushrooms release their juices, about 5 to 7 minutes.
2. Add the asparagus to the skillet; cook, covered, for an additional 3 minutes.
3. Uncover and cook over medium-high heat, stirring frequently, until most of the liquid has evaporated, approximately 3 minutes.
4. Season with salt, pepper, and lemon juice.
5. Meanwhile, cook the rotelle pasta in plenty of boiling, salted water until al dente, about 10 minutes. Reserve half a cup of the pasta cooking liquid.
6. Drain the pasta and toss it with the mushroom mixture and red bell pepper.
